commit.message:
feat: add login/logout UI to landscape planner

Added authentication UI components to landscape planner page:
- Login button for unauthenticated users (redirects to Cognito)
- User email display for authenticated users
- Logout button for authenticated users
- Added thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 dependency for sec: namespace

This fixes the authentication flow - users can now see they need to login
and can do so before trying to create landscape plans.

Center-align control labels with tooltip icons and tooltip text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add /finish command and finish-task.sh to repo, restore runner installation (#25)

These files existed locally but were never committed:
- commands/finish.md — the /finish slash command for agents
- finish-task.sh — marks task status and signals the runner

Also restore the runner logic that copies the finish command into clones
and exports AGENT_POOL_* env vars for the finish script to use.

commit.message:
Dragon's Realm - fantasy adventure platformer

10-level platformer with a baby dragon that grows through 3 stages.
Modern vector art style using Canvas 2D gradients and bezier curves.
Features 8 enemy types, 8 unique boss fights, parallax backgrounds,
particle effects, and a growth/evolution system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update defaults to moderate values and add control tooltips

Defaults: 24% income tax, 1.3% dividend yield. Each slider now
has a ? tooltip explaining what it controls and typical values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Unify all pages to Midnight & Platinum dark theme

Convert agents, login, pricing, about, terms, and privacy pages
from the old light cream (#F8F5F0) palette to the dark Midnight &
Platinum theme (#080B10) matching the landing page hero redesign.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix SyntaxError: make ws.onmessage async + improve reconnect UX

- ws.onmessage was non-async but contained `await loadCharacters()`
  from the tether WS handler, crashing the entire script on load and
  preventing WebSocket connections from ever being established.
- Don't re-show the full-screen loading spinner on auto-reconnects.
- Extend reconnect window from 5 attempts/30s to 12 attempts/~5min
  so browsers survive Railway deploys without manual refresh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: Step 3-7 テストカバレッジ強化 + バグ修正 + API認証強化（1324テスト通過）

* fix: Blueprint route imports to fix 404 errors in tests

Added missing route module imports to all three blueprint __init__.py files:
- app/auth/__init__.py: add 'from app.auth import routes'
- app/views/__init__.py: add imports for all 6 view modules
- app/api/__init__.py: add imports for all 8 API modules

Without these imports, @blueprint.route() decorators never fired at
import time, leaving all routes unregistered (404 for every endpoint).
This fix raises test pass rate from 31% to 45% coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Step 3 - API test coverage 0%→80%+ for all 7 API modules

Added 263 new unit tests via Agent Teams parallel development:

- test_api_alerts.py:       33 tests (alerts.py: 82% coverage)
- test_api_backup.py:       26 tests (backup.py: 88% coverage)
- test_api_dashboard.py:    27 tests (dashboard.py: 82% coverage)
- test_api_media.py:        43 tests (media.py: 79% coverage)
- test_api_verification.py: 39 tests (verification.py: 67% coverage)
- test_api_reports.py:      28 tests (reports.py: 74% coverage)
- test_api_jobs_full.py:    67 tests (jobs.py: 83% coverage)

Total test suite: 956 passed, 12 skipped (up from 655 passed)
Overall coverage: 45% → 53% (+8%)

All tests use session-based authentication via authenticated_client
fixture; no JWT tokens needed for test isolation.

Bugs discovered by tests:
- func.date() in SQLite returns string (dashboard compliance/stats)
- borrow_media accesses data["expected_return"] before validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Step 4 - テストカバレッジ強化 + APIバグ修正（53%→58%）

## テスト追加
- tests/unit/test_scheduler.py: 96テスト新規作成
  - CronScheduler, CalendarScheduler, BackupScheduler, RetryConfig
  - JobDependencyManager, JobQueue, ResourceManager, JobExecutor
- tests/unit/test_alert_manager.py: 17→93テスト（alert_manager 39%→78%）
  - EmailNotification, TeamsNotification, ClearOldAlerts等全クラス網羅
- tests/unit/test_notification_service.py: 16→43テスト（notification_service 50%→86%）
  - MultiChannelNotificationOrchestrator, channel health, statistics

## APIバグ修正
- app/api/dashboard.py: func.date()のSQLite/PostgreSQL互換修正
  - isinstance(date_val, str) ガード追加（compliance_trend, statistics）
- app/api/media.py: borrow_mediaのKeyError修正
  - expected_return キー存在確認後にstrptime実行

## 本番コードの潜在的バグ発見（要後続対応）
- scheduler.py: JobDependencyManager.mark_completed() + ResourceManager.allocate()
  に非再入可能Lockのデッドロックリスク（threading.RLockへの置換が必要）

Total: 1155 passed, 12 skipped | Coverage: 53% → 58%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: scheduler デッドロックバグ修正（threading.Lock → RLock）

## 問題
テスト作成中にAgent-Fが発見した本番コードのデッドロックリスク:

1. JobDependencyManager.mark_completed() が self.lock を保持したまま
   is_ready() を呼び出し、同じロックを再取得しようとする
2. ResourceManager.allocate() が self.lock を保持したまま
   can_allocate() を呼び出し、同じロックを再取得しようとする

threading.Lock は非再入可能なため、同一スレッドでも2回目の取得で
永久にブロック（デッドロック）が発生する。

## 修正
- app/scheduler/job_queue.py: JobDependencyManager.lock を RLock に変更
- app/scheduler/executor.py: ResourceManager.lock を RLock に変更

threading.RLock は同一スレッドからの再取得を許可するため解決。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Step 5 - ビューレイヤーテスト強化 + verification.pyバグ修正

Agent Teams並列実行（Agent-H/I/J/K）でView層テストを大幅強化:

## テストカバレッジ向上
- views/settings.py: 25→84テスト（+59新規）
- views/jobs.py: 56%→87%（+52テスト、63テスト）
- views/media.py: 49%→79%（+30テスト、48テスト）
- views/verification.py: 57%→85%（+41テスト、54テスト）

## バグ修正（テスト発見）
- verification.py execute(): `result=` → `test_result=` フィールド名修正
  （VerificationTestモデルのフィールド名と不一致）

## 新規テストクラス
- TestJobListFilters, TestJobCreatePost, TestJobEditViewExpanded等
- TestMediaListFilters, TestMediaCreatePost, TestMediaCheckoutLend等
- TestSettingsExportFormats, TestSettingsValidateImportAdvanced等
- TestVerificationListFilters, TestVerificationScheduleViewExtended等

全体: 1153 passed, 4 skipped（全テスト通過確認）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Step 7 - API認証強化（APIキーローテーション + タイムゾーンバグ修正）

commit.message:
Add OAuth2 JWT Bearer authentication with JWKS/RS256 validation

Omilia OCP Exports API sends an Authorization: Bearer <JWT> header on
each webhook request. The webhook now validates tokens against a
configurable JWKS endpoint (RS256). The existing x-webhook-secret
static header auth is preserved as a fallback. Both methods can be
enabled simultaneously — JWT is tried first.

New env vars: JWKS_URI, JWT_ISSUER (optional), JWT_AUDIENCE (optional).
CDK context: jwksUri, jwtIssuer, jwtAudience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add window close detection, auto-surface on close, and Resurface Zones

KWin script now sends windowRemoved signal via D-Bus when windows close.
Pave removes the window from the zone tracker and auto-surfaces the next
window in the stack. Adds "Resurface Zones" tray menu item and D-Bus
command that unminimizes the top window in every occupied zone.

Rediseño completo de paleta de colores: navy a amarillo/gris

- Cambiar tema de azul navy (#1E3A5F) a amarillo (#F2A900) + gris (#2D2D2D)
- Actualizar todos los componentes UI (Button, Card, Badge, Modal, Input, Table, etc.)
- Rediseñar Login con layout split-screen y panel de branding
- Actualizar Sidebar, Topbar y MainLayout con nueva paleta
- Aplicar nuevos colores en todas las paginas y features POS
- Actualizar estilos mobile CSS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add runtime validation to prevent search page crash on malformed results (#103)

The search page crashed with "can't access property 'media_kind',
result.source is undefined" when the API returned results with missing
source metadata. This adds three layers of defense:

1. Runtime type guards (isValidSearchResult) that validate result shape
2. Proper discriminated union narrowing in buildSourceMeta
3. Boundary filtering in the search page to drop invalid results gracefully

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix action generation for high-unsure dimensions, eliminate false 'Most elements in place'

- getDimensionInsight: early return for unsure-dominant dims (>=40%) with honest diagnosis
- Action builder: unsure-dominant path generates confirmation-first actions instead of gap actions
- Fallback fix: 'Most elements in place' only when 60%+ are confirmed strengths
- New fallback paths for unsure-present and genuinely-few-gaps scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

opus-2026-03-05-S4c: Claim B discovery — key reduction for OCF proof

Major breakthrough: the OCF proof reduces to a single standalone identity
about tournament Hamiltonian path weights (Claim B):

  sum_{S⊆W\{v}} (-1)^|S| H(S) h_start(W\S, v) = (-1)^{m+1} h_end(W, v)

Verified computationally at m=1,...,8. Proved algebraically at m=1,2,3.
The full proof chain: Claim B → B(Li,Rj)=B(Lj,Ri) → OCF → Claim A.

Key discoveries:
- Corrected s-evenness reduction (C_w+D_w=0 was wrong)
- Pairing structure: left(u)=right(u) by induction on sub-tournaments
- d-dependent terms cancel, leaving Claim B as sole remaining step

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix image 400s by skipping Next.js image optimizer for uploads (#57)

The /_next/image proxy rejects upload URLs in both dev (port mismatch
in remotePatterns) and prod (standalone mode can't resolve rewrites
internally). Switch to unoptimized: true so <Image> still provides
lazy loading and layout but serves uploads directly through the
rewrite proxy.

fix: meme-maker uses qwen2.5:7b instead of llama3.2:1b for captions

llama3.2:1b (1B params) produces unreliable structured JSON output.
qwen2.5:7b is specifically strong at instruction-following and JSON generation,
making it the correct choice for the split-pipeline caption step.

- Install script now pulls qwen2.5:7b instead of llama3.2:1b
- Flask app default fallback changed to qwen2.5:7b

commit.message:
Add live HeroCard + context label pipeline (Phase 3)

Live HeroCard:
- Show current scores in live mode (hero-live-score)
- OT full-width banner strip (hero-ot-banner, period ≥ 3, pulses)
- Period + clock sub-line in header (hero-live-period)
- Possession indicator (hero-possession, hidden when null)
- Context label editorial line (hero-context-label, hidden in recap)
- periodLabel → "1st Half" / "2nd Half" / "OT" / "2OT" / "3OT"

Context Labels pipeline:
- contextLabel.ts: getSeasonWeek, getSeasonPhase, computeContextLabel (pure)
- Season phases from SEASON_START=2025-11-04: EARLY/MID/LATE/CRUNCH
- Label types (priority): BUBBLE_BOTH > CONF_FIRST > BUBBLE_ONE > CONF_RACE > FIRST_TEAMS_OUT
- tranketologyClient + tranketologyNormalizer: scrapes barttorvik.com/tranketology.php
- confStandingsClient + confStandingsNormalizer: fetches /{YYYY}_conferences.json; computes GB
- Both stored in AdvancedStatsTeam (provider="tranketology"/"confstandings")
- Ingest route extended with tranketology + confstandings provider blocks
- watchscore/route.ts: batch-builds context maps, computes seasonPhase, enriches each game
- GameCard: context-label chip on SCHEDULED/IN_PROGRESS sections
- Admin: "Refresh Context Data" button
- context-stats.yml: nightly cron (5am UTC) → POST /api/admin/ingest/advanced-stats
- upsertAdvancedStats provider param widened to string

Tests: 254 passing, 13 files (97 new tests)

fix: gen_monsters.py HIGH_PM formula and normalizeMonsterFields output

1. HIGH_PM: Changed len(monsters)-1 to len(monsters)-2 to match C's
   NUMMONS-2 convention (last non-quest-leader monster index).

2. normalizeMonsterFields: Generator now outputs the full normalization
   function that sets mlet/mlevel/m_lev/msize aliases on every mons[]
   entry, not just the attack field canonicalization loop. Without these
   aliases, ~450 callsites across the codebase get undefined values.

feat(deploy): rolling canary deploy with Cloudflare LB health check (#665)

Replace simultaneous production deploy with rolling canary pattern:

commit.message:
Add architecture diagram (draw.io) and update .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: nginx always serves fresh index.html — prevents stale chunk 404s

location / now sends Cache-Control: no-store for all responses including
the try_files /index.html fallback (SPA routes). Previously the fallback
bypassed the location = /index.html block's no-cache headers, so browsers
cached old index.html referencing stale chunk hashes after deploys.

Hashed /assets/*.js|css still get immutable long-term cache (content-addressed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add detailed benchmark framework design and reorganize docs

- Add docs/benchmark-framework-design.md: complete 4-layer benchmark
  design (micro compute → factor isolation → real programs → end-to-end)
  with precise dataset inventory (BCF 1588 variants, 916 kernel selftests,
  57 bcc tools, 23 Tetragon sensors), data collection specs, measurement
  methodology, and tool development plan
- Move reference analysis docs to docs/references/ subfolder
- Rename research landscape → ebpf-bench-research-plan.md
- Update README to reflect new docs structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
